revision.text:
'''甲辰'''（きのえたつ、こうしん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて41番目で、前は[[癸卯]]、次は[[乙巳]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は木、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==甲辰の年==
==甲辰の日== ===[[選日]]=== 甲辰の日は[[天一天上]]の12日目である。

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''甲辰'''（きのえたつ、こうぼくのたつ、こうしん、ちんそうのたつ）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの41番目で、前は[[癸卯]]、次は[[乙巳]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[甲]]は[[陽]]の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==甲辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って44が余る年が甲辰の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲辰の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[44年]] *[[104年]] *[[164年]] *[[224年]] *[[284年]] *[[344年]] *[[404年]] *[[464年]] *[[524年]] *[[584年]] *[[644年]] *[[704年]] *[[764年]] *[[824年]] *[[884年]] *[[944年]] | *[[1004年]] *[[1064年]] *[[1124年]] *[[1184年]] *[[1244年]] *[[1304年]] *[[1364年]] *[[1424年]] *[[1484年]] *[[1544年]] *[[1604年]] *[[1664年]] *[[1724年]] *[[1784年]] *[[1844年]] *[[1904年]] *[[1964年]] | *[[2024年]] *[[2084年]] *[[2144年]] *[[2204年]] *[[2264年]] *[[2324年]] *[[2384年]] *[[2444年]] *[[2504年]] *[[2564年]] *[[2624年]] *[[2684年]] *[[2744年]] *[[2804年]] *[[2864年]] *[[2924年]] *[[2984年]] |}
==甲辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[3月]]が甲辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲辰の日== ===選日=== 甲辰の日は[[天一天上]]の12日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:きのえたつ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:new pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:甲辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[category{甲辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:甲辰]]

{{干支}} '''甲辰'''（きのえたつ、こうぼくのたつ、こうしん、ちんそうのたつ）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの41番目で、前は[[癸卯]]、次は[[乙巳]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[甲]]は[[陽]]の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==甲辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って44が余る年が甲辰の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲辰の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[44年]] *[[104年]] *[[164年]] *[[224年]] *[[284年]] *[[344年]] *[[404年]] *[[464年]] *[[524年]] *[[584年]] *[[644年]] *[[704年]] *[[764年]] *[[824年]] *[[884年]] *[[944年]] | *[[1004年]] *[[1064年]] *[[1124年]] *[[1184年]] *[[1244年]] *[[1304年]] *[[1364年]] *[[1424年]] *[[1484年]] *[[1544年]] *[[1604年]] *[[1664年]] *[[1724年]] *[[1784年]] *[[1844年]] *[[1904年]] *[[1964年]] | *[[2024年]] *[[2084年]] *[[2144年]] *[[2204年]] *[[2264年]] *[[2324年]] *[[2384年]] *[[2444年]] *[[2504年]] *[[2564年]] *[[2624年]] *[[2684年]] *[[2744年]] *[[2804年]] *[[2864年]] *[[2924年]] *[[2984年]] |}
==甲辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[3月]]が甲辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲辰の日== ===選日=== 甲辰の日は[[天一天上]]の12日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:きのえたつ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:甲辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:甲辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:unsorted completion categories]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:甲辰]]

Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの41番目で、前は[[癸卯]]、次は[[乙巳]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[甲]]は[[陽]]の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==甲辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って44が余る年が甲辰の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲辰の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[44年]] *[[104年]] *[[164年]] *[[224年]] *[[284年]] *[[344年]] *[[404年]] *[[464年]] *[[524年]] *[[584年]] *[[644年]] *[[704年]] *[[764年]] *[[824年]] *[[884年]] *[[944年]] | *[[1004年]] *[[1064年]] *[[1124年]] *[[1184年]] *[[1244年]] *[[1304年]] *[[1364年]] *[[1424年]] *[[1484年]] *[[1544年]] *[[1604年]] *[[1664年]] *[[1724年]] *[[1784年]] *[[1844年]] *[[1904年]] *[[1964年]] | *[[2024年]] *[[2084年]] *[[2144年]] *[[2204年]] *[[2264年]] *[[2324年]] *[[2384年]] *[[2444年]] *[[2504年]] *[[2564年]] *[[2624年]] *[[2684年]] *[[2744年]] *[[2804年]] *[[2864年]] *[[2924年]] *[[2984年]] |}
==甲辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[3月]]が甲辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲辰の日== ===選日=== 甲辰の日は[[天一天上]]の12日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|きのえたつ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Dragon-qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:甲辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:甲辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Dragon-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Dragon}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:甲辰]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:qq]]

==甲辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って44が余る年が甲辰の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲辰の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[44年]] *[[104年]] *[[164年]] *[[224年]] *[[284年]] *[[344年]] *[[404年]] *[[464年]] *[[524年]] *[[584年]] *[[644年]] *[[704年]] *[[764年]] *[[824年]] *[[884年]] *[[944年]] | *[[1004年]] *[[1064年]] *[[1124年]] *[[1184年]] *[[1244年]] *[[1304年]] *[[1364年]] *[[1424年]] *[[1484年]] *[[1544年]] *[[1604年]] *[[1664年]] *[[1724年]] *[[1784年]] *[[1844年]] *[[1904年]] *[[1964年]] | *[[2024年]] *[[2084年]] *[[2144年]] *[[2204年]] *[[2264年]] *[[2324年]] *[[2384年]] *[[2444年]] *[[2504年]] *[[2564年]] *[[2624年]] *[[2684年]] *[[2744年]] *[[2804年]] *[[2864年]] *[[2924年]] *[[2984年]] |}
==甲辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[3月]]が甲辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲辰の日== ===選日=== 甲辰の日は[[天一天上]]の12日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|きのえたつ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Dragon-qq]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:甲辰]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:甲辰]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Dragon-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:甲辰]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yang Wood Dragon]] [[sn:Yang Wood Dragon]]

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dragon|kanji=甲辰|romaji=kinoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎchén|w=chia-ch'en|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʈʂʰən|y=gaap6 san4|j=gaap6 san4|ci=kaːp̚ sɐn|mc=kæp ɖin|oc-bs=kaːp ɖiŋ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Dragon also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 甲辰'''（きのえたつ、こうぼくのたつ、こうしん、ちんそうのたつ）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの41番目で、前は[[癸卯]]、次は[[乙巳]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[甲]]は[[陽]]の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==甲辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って44が余る年が甲辰の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲辰の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[44年]] *[[104年]] *[[164年]] *[[224年]] *[[284年]] *[[344年]] *[[404年]] *[[464年]] *[[524年]] *[[584年]] *[[644年]] *[[704年]] *[[764年]] *[[824年]] *[[884年]] *[[944年]] | *[[1004年]] *[[1064年]] *[[1124年]] *[[1184年]] *[[1244年]] *[[1304年]] *[[1364年]] *[[1424年]] *[[1484年]] *[[1544年]] *[[1604年]] *[[1664年]] *[[1724年]] *[[1784年]] *[[1844年]] *[[1904年]] *[[1964年]] | *[[2024年]] *[[2084年]] *[[2144年]] *[[2204年]] *[[2264年]] *[[2324年]] *[[2384年]] *[[2444年]] *[[2504年]] *[[2564年]] *[[2624年]] *[[2684年]] *[[2744年]] *[[2804年]] *[[2864年]] *[[2924年]] *[[2984年]] |}
==甲辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[3月]]が甲辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲辰の日== ===選日=== 甲辰の日は[[天一天上]]の12日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|きのえたつ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dragon|kanji=甲辰|romaji=kinoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎchén|w=chia-ch'en|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʈʂʰən|y=gaap6 san4|j=gaap6 san4|ci=kaːp̚ sɐn|mc=kæp ɖin|oc-bs=kaːp ɖiŋ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|甲辰}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|癸卯|ja|癸卯}} and preceding {{ill|乙巳|ja|乙巳}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, {{ill|甲|ja|十干}} represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while {{ill|辰|ja|十二支}} represents the Yang aspect of {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}. This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋}}.
== Years of Kōshin == A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[44]] * [[104]] * [[164]] * [[224]] * [[284]] * [[344]] * [[404]] * [[464]] * [[524]] * [[584]] * [[644]] * [[704]] * [[764]] * [[824]] * [[884]] * [[944]] | * [[1004]] * [[1064]] * [[1124]] * [[1184]] * [[1244]] * [[1304]] * [[1364]] * [[1424]] * [[1484]] * [[1544]] * [[1604]] * [[1664]] * [[1724]] * [[1784]] * [[1844]] * [[1904]] * [[1964]] | * [[2024]] * [[2084]] * [[2144]] * [[2204]] * [[2264]] * [[2324]] * [[2384]] * [[2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[2924]] * [[2984]] |}
== Months of Kōshin == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|壬|ja|壬}} or {{ill|丁|ja|丁}}), the month of {{ill|March|ja|3月}} is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦}} months or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}}.
== Days of Kōshin == === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|きのえたつ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Dragon-qq]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:甲辰]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:甲辰]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Dragon-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dragon|kanji=甲辰|romaji=kinoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎchén|w=chia-ch'en|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʈʂʰən|y=gaap6 san4|j=gaap6 san4|ci=kaːp̚ sɐn|mc=kæp ɖin|oc-bs=kaːp ɖiŋ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|甲辰}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|癸卯|ja|癸卯}} and preceding {{ill|乙巳|ja|乙巳}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, {{ill|甲|ja|十干}} represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while {{ill|辰|ja|十二支}} represents the Yang aspect of {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}. This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋}}.
== Years of Kōshin == A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[44]] * [[104]] * [[164]] * [[224]] * [[284]] * [[344]] * [[404]] * [[464]] * [[524]] * [[584]] * [[644]] * [[704]] * [[764]] * [[824]] * [[884]] * [[944]] | * [[1004]] * [[1064]] * [[1124]] * [[1184]] * [[1244]] * [[1304]] * [[1364]] * [[1424]] * [[1484]] * [[1544]] * [[1604]] * [[1664]] * [[1724]] * [[1784]] * [[1844]] * [[1904]] * [[1964]] | * [[2024]] * [[2084]] * [[2144]] * [[2204]] * [[2264]] * [[2324]] * [[2384]] * [[2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[2924]] * [[2984]] |}
== Months of Kōshin == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|壬|ja|壬}} or {{ill|丁|ja|丁}}), the month of {{ill|March|ja|3月}} is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦}} months or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}}.
== Days of Kōshin == === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上}}.

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dragon|kanji=甲辰|romaji=kinoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎchén|w=chia-ch'en|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʈʂʰən|y=gaap6 san4|j=gaap6 san4|ci=kaːp̚ sɐn|mc=kæp ɖin|oc-bs=kaːp ɖiŋ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|甲辰}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|癸卯|ja|癸卯}} and preceding {{ill|乙巳|ja|乙巳}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, {{ill|甲|ja|十干}} represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while {{ill|辰|ja|十二支}} represents the Yang aspect of {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}. This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋}}.
== Years of Kōshin == A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[44]] * [[104]] * [[164]] * [[224]] * [[284]] * [[344]] * [[404]] * [[464]] * [[524]] * [[584]] * [[644]] * [[704]] * [[764]] * [[824]] * [[884]] * [[944]] | * [[1004]] * [[1064]] * [[1124]] * [[1184]] * [[1244]] * [[1304]] * [[1364]] * [[1424]] * [[1484]] * [[1544]] * [[1604]] * [[1664]] * [[1724]] * [[1784]] * [[1844]] * [[1904]] * [[1964]] | * [[2024]] * [[2084]] * [[2144]] * [[2204]] * [[2264]] * [[2324]] * [[2384]] * [[2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[2924]] * [[2984]] |}
== Months of Kōshin == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|壬|ja|壬}} or {{ill|丁|ja|丁}}), the month of {{ill|March|ja|3月}} is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦}} months or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}}.
== Days of Kōshin == === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上}}.

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dragon|kanji=甲辰|romaji=kinoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎchén|w=chia-ch'en|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʈʂʰən|y=gaap6 san4|j=gaap6 san4|ci=kaːp̚ sɐn|mc=kæp ɖin|oc-bs=kaːp ɖiŋ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|甲辰}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|癸卯|ja|癸卯}} and preceding {{ill|乙巳|ja|乙巳}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, {{ill|甲|ja|十干}} represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while {{ill|辰|ja|十二支}} represents the Yang aspect of {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}. This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋}}.
== Years of Kōshin == A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[44]] * [[104]] * [[164]] * [[224]] * [[284]] * [[344]] * [[404]] * [[464]] * [[524]] * [[584]] * [[644]] * [[704]] * [[764]] * [[824]] * [[884]] * [[944]] | * [[1004]] * [[1064]] * [[1124]] * [[1184]] * [[1244]] * [[1304]] * [[1364]] * [[1424]] * [[1484]] * [[1544]] * [[1604]] * [[1664]] * [[1724]] * [[1784]] * [[1844]] * [[1904]] * [[1964]] | * [[2024]] * [[2084]] * [[2144]] * [[2204]] * [[2264]] * [[2324]] * [[2384]] * [[2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[2924]] * [[2984]] |}
== Months of Kōshin == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|壬|ja|壬}} or {{ill|丁|ja|丁}}), the month of {{ill|March|ja|3月}} is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦}} months or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}}.
== Days of Kōshin == === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dragon|kanji=甲辰|romaji=kinoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎchén|w=chia-ch'en|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʈʂʰən|y=gaap6 san4|j=gaap6 san4|ci=kaːp̚ sɐn|mc=kæp ɖin|oc-bs=kaːp ɖiŋ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|甲辰}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|癸卯|ja|癸卯}} and preceding {{ill|乙巳|ja|乙巳}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, {{ill|甲|ja|十干}} represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while {{ill|辰|ja|十二支}} represents the Yang aspect of {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}. This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋}}.
== Years of Kōshin == A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[44]] * [[104]] * [[164]] * [[224]] * [[284]] * [[344]] * [[404]] * [[464]] * [[524]] * [[584]] * [[644]] * [[704]] * [[764]] * [[824]] * [[884]] * [[944]] | * [[1004]] * [[1064]] * [[1124]] * [[1184]] * [[1244]] * [[1304]] * [[1364]] * [[1424]] * [[1484]] * [[1544]] * [[1604]] * [[1664]] * [[1724]] * [[1784]] * [[1844]] * [[1904]] * [[1964]] | * [[2024]] * [[2084]] * [[2144]] * [[2204]] * [[2264]] * [[2324]] * [[2384]] * [[2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[2924]] * [[2984]] |}
== Months of Kōshin == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|壬|ja|壬}} or {{ill|丁|ja|丁}}), the month of {{ill|March|ja|3月}} is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦}} months or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}}.
== Days of Kōshin == === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|きのえたつ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] <!--Yang Wood Dragon-->[[category:qq close]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:甲辰]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:甲辰]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] <!--Yang Wood Dragon-->[[category:qq close]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:甲辰]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[fr:Dragon de bois]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[fr:Dragon de bois]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[fr:Dragon de bois]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[Category:qq]][[ja:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[fr:Dragon de bois]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[fr:Dragon de bois]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[fr:Dragon de bois]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[Category:qq]][[ja:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[fr:Dragon de bois]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:if these are dates then move them to completion tier 5]][[sn:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:if these are dates then move them to completion tier 5]] [[Category:if these are dates then move them to completion tier 5]][[sn:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:if these are dates then move them to completion tier 5]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:ang Wood Dragon]] [[ja:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[fr:Dragon de bois]][[de:Holz-Drache]] [[af:Aardeaap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Yîm-cṳ̄de]][[de:Erde-Affeneen]][[en:Earth Monkey]][[fr:Singe de terreboishak]][[it:Yim-chṳ́id]][[sn:enshinja]][[ko:임신 (간지)]][[nds:Erd-Affenvi]][[vi:Nhâm Thân]][[za:Yimceij]][[zh-min-nan:Lîm-chin]][[zh-yue:壬申]][[zh:壬申]]

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|甲辰}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|癸卯|ja|癸卯}} and preceding {{ill|乙巳|ja|乙巳}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, {{ill|甲|ja|十干}} represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while {{ill|辰|ja|十二支}} represents the Yang aspect of {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}. This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋}}.
== Years of Kōshin == A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[44]] * [[104]] * [[164]] * [[224]] * [[284]] * [[344]] * [[404]] * [[464]] * [[524]] * [[584]] * [[644]] * [[704]] * [[764]] * [[824]] * [[884]] * [[944]] | * [[1004]] * [[1064]] * [[1124]] * [[1184]] * [[1244]] * [[1304]] * [[1364]] * [[1424]] * [[1484]] * [[1544]] * [[1604]] * [[1664]] * [[1724]] * [[1784]] * [[1844]] * [[1904]] * [[1964]] | * [[2024]] * [[2084]] * [[2144]] * [[2204]] * [[2264]] * [[2324]] * [[2384]] * [[2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[2924]] * [[2984]] |}
== Months of Kōshin == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|壬|ja|壬}} or {{ill|丁|ja|丁}}), the month of {{ill|March|ja|3月}} is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} months or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}}.
== Days of Kōshin == === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|きのえたつ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] <!--Yang Wood Dragon-->[[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:甲辰]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:甲辰]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] <!--Yang Wood Dragon-->[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:甲辰]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[fr:Dragon de bois]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[fr:Dragon de bois]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[fr:Dragon de bois]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[Category:qq]][[ja:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[fr:Dragon de bois]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[fr:Dragon de bois]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[fr:Dragon de bois]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[Category:qq]][[ja:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[fr:Dragon de bois]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:if these are dates then move them to completion tier 5]][[sn:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:if these are dates then move them to completion tier 5]] [[Category:if these are dates then move them to completion tier 5]][[sn:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:if these are dates then move them to completion tier 5]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:ang Wood Dragon]] [[ja:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[fr:Dragon de bois]][[de:Holz-Drache]] [[af:Aardeaap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Yîm-cṳ̄de]][[de:Erde-Affeneen]][[en:Earth Monkey]][[fr:Singe de terreboishak]][[it:Yim-chṳ́id]][[sn:enshinja]][[ko:임신 (간지)]][[nds:Erd-Affenvi]][[vi:Nhâm Thân]][[za:Yimceij]][[zh-min-nan:Lîm-chin]][[zh-yue:壬申]][[zh:壬申]]

== Years of Kōshin == A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[44]] * [[104]] * [[164]] * [[224]] * [[284]] * [[344]] * [[404]] * [[464]] * [[524]] * [[584]] * [[644]] * [[704]] * [[764]] * [[824]] * [[884]] * [[944]] | * [[1004]] * [[1064]] * [[1124]] * [[1184]] * [[1244]] * [[1304]] * [[1364]] * [[1424]] * [[1484]] * [[1544]] * [[1604]] * [[1664]] * [[1724]] * [[1784]] * [[1844]] * [[1904]] * [[1964]] | * [[2024]] * [[2084]] * [[2144]] * [[2204]] * [[2264]] * [[2324]] * [[2384]] * [[2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[2924]] * [[2984]] |}
== Months of Kōshin == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)}} or {{ill|丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}), the month of {{ill|March|ja|3月}} is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} months or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}}.
== Days of Kōshin == === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上}}.

== Years of Kōshin == A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[44]] * [[104]] * [[164]] * [[224]] * [[284]] * [[344]] * [[404]] * [[464]] * [[524]] * [[584]] * [[644]] * [[704]] * [[764]] * [[824]] * [[884]] * [[944]] | * [[1004]] * [[1064]] * [[1124]] * [[1184]] * [[1244]] * [[1304]] * [[1364]] * [[1424]] * [[1484]] * [[1544]] * [[1604]] * [[1664]] * [[1724]] * [[1784]] * [[1844]] * [[1904]] * [[1964]] | * [[2024]] * [[2084]] * [[2144]] * [[2204]] * [[2264]] * [[2324]] * [[2384]] * [[2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[2924]] * [[2984]] |}
== Months of Kōshin == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)}} or {{ill|丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}), the month of {{ill|March|ja|3月}} is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} months or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}}.
== Days of Kōshin == === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上}}.

== Years of Kōshin == A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[44]] * [[104]] * [[164]] * [[224]] * [[284]] * [[344]] * [[404]] * [[464]] * [[524]] * [[584]] * [[644]] * [[704]] * [[764]] * [[824]] * [[884]] * [[944]] | * [[1004]] * [[1064]] * [[1124]] * [[1184]] * [[1244]] * [[1304]] * [[1364]] * [[1424]] * [[1484]] * [[1544]] * [[1604]] * [[1664]] * [[1724]] * [[1784]] * [[1844]] * [[1904]] * [[1964]] | * [[2024]] * [[2084]] * [[2144]] * [[2204]] * [[2264]] * [[2324]] * [[2384]] * [[2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[2924]] * [[2984]] |}
== Months of Kōshin == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)}} or {{ill|丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}), the month of {{ill|March|ja|3月}} is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} months or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}}.
== Days of Kōshin == === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上}}.

== Years of Kōshin == A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[44]] * [[104]] * [[164]] * [[224]] * [[284]] * [[344]] * [[404]] * [[464]] * [[524]] * [[584]] * [[644]] * [[704]] * [[764]] * [[824]] * [[884]] * [[944]] | * [[1004]] * [[1064]] * [[1124]] * [[1184]] * [[1244]] * [[1304]] * [[1364]] * [[1424]] * [[1484]] * [[1544]] * [[1604]] * [[1664]] * [[1724]] * [[1784]] * [[1844]] * [[1904]] * [[1964]] | * [[2024]] * [[2084]] * [[2144]] * [[2204]] * [[2264]] * [[2324]] * [[2384]] * [[2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[2924]] * [[2984]] |}
== Months of Kōshin == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)}} or {{ill|丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}), the month of {{ill|March|ja|3月}} is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} months or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}}.
== Days of Kōshin == === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上}}.

== Years of Kōshin == A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[44]] * [[104]] * [[164]] * [[224]] * [[284]] * [[344]] * [[404]] * [[464]] * [[524]] * [[584]] * [[644]] * [[704]] * [[764]] * [[824]] * [[884]] * [[944]] | * [[1004]] * [[1064]] * [[1124]] * [[1184]] * [[1244]] * [[1304]] * [[1364]] * [[1424]] * [[1484]] * [[1544]] * [[1604]] * [[1664]] * [[1724]] * [[1784]] * [[1844]] * [[1904]] * [[1964]] | * [[2024]] * [[2084]] * [[2144]] * [[2204]] * [[2264]] * [[2324]] * [[2384]] * [[2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[2924]] * [[2984]] |}
== Months of Kōshin == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)}} or {{ill|丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}), the month of {{ill|March|ja|3月}} is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} months or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}}.
== Days of Kōshin == === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上}}.

It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|癸卯|ja|癸卯}} and preceding {{ill|乙巳|ja|乙巳}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, {{ill|甲|ja|十干}} represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while {{ill|辰|ja|十二支}} represents the Yang aspect of {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}. This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋}}.
== Years of Kōshin == A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[44]] * [[104]] * [[164]] * [[224]] * [[284]] * [[344]] * [[404]] * [[464]] * [[524]] * [[584]] * [[644]] * [[704]] * [[764]] * [[824]] * [[884]] * [[944]] | * [[1004]] * [[1064]] * [[1124]] * [[1184]] * [[1244]] * [[1304]] * [[1364]] * [[1424]] * [[1484]] * [[1544]] * [[1604]] * [[1664]] * [[1724]] * [[1784]] * [[1844]] * [[1904]] * [[1964]] | * [[2024]] * [[2084]] * [[2144]] * [[2204]] * [[2264]] * [[2324]] * [[2384]] * [[2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[2924]] * [[2984]] |}

However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} months or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}}.
== Days of Kōshin == === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上}}.

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtdraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sìng]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[hak:Kap-sìn]][[ja:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[vi:Giáp Thìn]][[za:Gyapsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-sîn]][[zh_yue:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904754]] Wikidata name: Yang Wood Dragon [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dragon|kanji=甲辰|romaji=kinoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎchén|w=chia-ch'en|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʈʂʰən|y=gaap6 san4|j=gaap6 san4|ci=kaːp̚ sɐn|mc=kæp ɖin|oc-bs=kaːp ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

(土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu '''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn

--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of '''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of
