'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of '''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu '''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu '''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtdraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sìng]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[hak:Kap-sìn]][[ja:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[vi:Giáp Thìn]][[za:Gyapsaenz]][[zh_min_nan:Kap-sîn]][[zh_yue:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtdraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sìng]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[hak:Kap-sìn]][[ja:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[vi:Giáp Thìn]][[za:Gyapsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-sîn]][[zh-yue:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904754]] Wikidata name: Yang Wood Dragon [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dragon|kanji=甲辰|romaji=kinoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎchén|w=chia-ch'en|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʈʂʰən|y=gaap6 san4|j=gaap6 san4|ci=kaːp̚ sɐn|mc=kæp ɖin|oc-bs=kaːp ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu '''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of --> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu '''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dragon== A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kōshin''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:44|44]] * [[:en:104|104]] * [[:en:164|164]] * [[:en:224|224]] * [[:en:284|284]] * [[:en:344|344]] * [[:en:404|404]] * [[:en:464|464]] * [[:en:524|524]] * [[:en:584|584]] * [[:en:644|644]] * [[:en:704|704]] * [[:en:764|764]] * [[:en:824|824]] * [[:en:884|884]] * [[:en:944|944]] | * [[:en:1004|1004]] * [[:en:1064|1064]] * [[:en:1124|1124]] * [[:en:1184|1184]] * [[:en:1244|1244]] * [[:en:1304|1304]] * [[:en:1364|1364]] * [[:en:1424|1424]] * [[:en:1484|1484]] * [[:en:1544|1544]] * [[:en:1604|1604]] * [[:en:1664|1664]] * [[:en:1724|1724]] * [[:en:1784|1784]] * [[:en:1844|1844]] * [[:en:1904|1904]] * [[:en:1964|1964]] | * [[:en:2024|2024]] * [[:en:2084|2084]] * [[:en:2144|2144]] * [[:en:2204|2204]] * [[:en:2264|2264]] * [[:en:2324|2324]] * [[:en:2384|2384]] * [[:en:2444|2444]] * [[2504]] * [[2564]] * [[2624]] * [[2684]] * [[2744]] * [[2804]] * [[2864]] * [[:en:2924|2924]] * [[:en:2984|2984]] |}
==Months of Yang Wood Dragon== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]], meaning the period from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]].
==Days of Yang Wood Dragon== === Selection Days === A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dragon|kanji=甲辰|romaji=kinoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎchén|w=chia-ch'en|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʈʂʰən|y=gaap6 san4|j=gaap6 san4|ci=kaːp̚ sɐn|mc=kæp ɖin|oc-bs=kaːp ɖiŋ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Kinoe (甲)}} represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno
