==Months of Yang Wood Dragon==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March}} is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}}.

==Days of Yang Wood Dragon==
=== Selection Days ===
A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dragon|kanji=甲辰|romaji=kinoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎchén|w=chia-ch'en|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʈʂʰən|y=gaap6 san4|j=gaap6 san4|ci=kaːp̚ sɐn|mc=kæp ɖin|oc-bs=kaːp ɖiŋ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Kinoe (甲)}} represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dragon|kanji=甲辰|romaji=kinoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎchén|w=chia-ch'en|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʈʂʰən|y=gaap6 san4|j=gaap6 san4|ci=kaːp̚ sɐn|mc=kæp ɖin|oc-bs=kaːp ɖiŋ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Kinoe (甲)}} represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn

==Months of Yang Wood Dragon==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March}} is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}}.

==Days of Yang Wood Dragon==
=== Selection Days ===
A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

==Months of Yang Wood Dragon==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March}} is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}}.

==Days of Yang Wood Dragon==
=== Selection Days ===
A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Kinoe (甲)}} represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of ==Months of Yang Wood Dragon==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March}} is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}}.

==Days of Yang Wood Dragon==
=== Selection Days ===
A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dragon|kanji=甲辰|romaji=kinoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎchén|w=chia-ch'en|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʈʂʰən|y=gaap6 san4|j=gaap6 san4|ci=kaːp̚ sɐn|mc=kæp ɖin|oc-bs=kaːp ɖiŋ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Kinoe (甲)}} represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dragon|kanji=甲辰|romaji=kinoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎchén|w=chia-ch'en|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʈʂʰən|y=gaap6 san4|j=gaap6 san4|ci=kaːp̚ sɐn|mc=kæp ɖin|oc-bs=kaːp ɖiŋ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Kinoe (甲)}} represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn

==Months of Yang Wood Dragon==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March}} is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}}.

==Days of Yang Wood Dragon==
=== Selection Days ===
A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

==Months of Yang Wood Dragon==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March|1=March}} is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}}.

==Days of Yang Wood Dragon==
=== Selection Days ===
A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dragon|kanji=甲辰|romaji=kinoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎchén|w=chia-ch'en|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʈʂʰən|y=gaap6 san4|j=gaap6 san4|ci=kaːp̚ sɐn|mc=kæp ɖin|oc-bs=kaːp ɖiŋ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Kinoe (甲)|1=Heavenly Stems}} represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin and ==Months of Yang Wood Dragon==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March|1=March}} is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}}.

==Days of Yang Wood Dragon==
=== Selection Days ===
A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dragon|kanji=甲辰|romaji=kinoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎchén|w=chia-ch'en|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʈʂʰən|y=gaap6 san4|j=gaap6 san4|ci=kaːp̚ sɐn|mc=kæp ɖin|oc-bs=kaːp ɖiŋ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Kinoe (甲)|1=Heavenly Stems}} represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno ==Months of Yang Wood Dragon==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March|1=March}} is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}}.

==Days of Yang Wood Dragon==
=== Selection Days ===
A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dragon|kanji=甲辰|romaji=kinoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎchén|w=chia-ch'en|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʈʂʰən|y=gaap6 san4|j=gaap6 san4|ci=kaːp̚ sɐn|mc=kæp ɖin|oc-bs=kaːp ɖiŋ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Kinoe (甲)|1=Heavenly Stems}} represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn
